title: JSX elements should not use unknown properties and attributes
description: JSX elements should not use unknown properties and attributesAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalmaintainabilityreliabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEreactWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoReact components often render HTML elements, and developers can pass various props (properties) to these elements. However, React has its own set of supported properties and attributes, and it’s essential to avoid using unknown or invalid properties when working with such elements to prevent unexpected behavior at runtime.The rule reports any instances where you are using a property or attribute that is not recognized by React or the HTML element you are rendering.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure De
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.
